expression.expression: CAST('Potential for short shipment - One or more upcoming PO\'s may cause the available inventory to go negative, resulting in a short shipment.' AS STRING)
CAST('Produce more product, transfer more product into this warehouse, or make arrangements to ship this order from another warehouse with stock.' AS STRING)
CAST('Warehouse from Input File is not found in WH Master\'s SOURCE_WH_DESC field' AS STRING)
CAST('Either update the input file to use a standard warehouse ID or update the warehouse master to recognize the warehouse from the input file by adding a record to SOURCE_WH_DESC' AS STRING)
CAST('Duplicate SOURCE_SKU in Item Master File' AS STRING)
CAST('Remove the duplicate SOURCE_SKU in the Item Master File' AS STRING)
CAST('SKU in WOH Input File does not have a matching SOURCE_SKU in Item Master' AS STRING)
CAST('Update the SKU in either WOH Input File or Item Master to match.' AS STRING)
CAST('Unknown Ship-From WH for PO - The PO in Quickbooks does not indicate which warehouse this order will ship from.' AS STRING)
CAST('Go look at the PO in Quickbooks and assign a warehouse and tag it for pickup or delivery using the appropriate comment field in QBO.' AS STRING)
CAST('Duplicate SOURCE_WH_DESC in WH Master File' AS STRING)
CAST('Remove the duplicate SOURCE_WH_DESC in the WH Master File' AS STRING)
CAST('Items which have a sales forecast, but no inventory, production, transfers, or orders' AS STRING)
CAST('Check to see if inventory needs to be produced or if there is a missing entry in the Item Master.' AS STRING)
CAST('Items from Inventory, Sales, Production or Transfers which don\'t have a match in the 13 week sales file.' AS STRING)
CAST('Adjust 13 week sales file to account for these SKUs or figure out how to move the SKUs so they don\'t expire.' AS STRING)
CAST('Duplicate entries in source systems for same standard SKU' AS STRING)
CAST('Check source file to see if items should be consolidated in source system OR split into two items in Item Master.' AS STRING)
CAST('SKU from Input File is not found in Item Master\'s SOURCE_SKU field' AS STRING)

CAST('Either update the input file to use a standard SKU or update the item master to recognize the SKU from the input file by adding a record to SOURCE_SKU, SKU_STANDARD, and SKU_DESC_STANDARD' AS STRING)
CAST('Items from 13 week sales that don\'t have a match in Inventory, Sales, Production or Transfers.' AS STRING)
CAST('Figure out why we don\'t have any sales or inventory for the SKU if we have a recent sales history and make adjustments to input files/inventory balances appropriately.' AS STRING)

CAST(CASE WHEN contains(coalesce(lower(NAME), ''), lower('LOW')) THEN 'Consider producing more of this item so you don\'t run out, ship short, and lose revenue/upset buyers.' ELSE 'Find a way to move more product for this item so it doesn\'t sit around taking up space and capital or worse, expire.' END AS STRING)
